title: GLM 5.2 FULLY FREE & FAST CODER: This AI Coder is CRAZY & WORKS!
summary: GLM-5.2 is an open-weight coding model available free through OpenCode's Big Pickle interface, offering around 200 free requests per five-hour window. The model delivers high token speeds and low latency, suitable for coding tasks including repo exploration, bug fixes, and refactoring.
writeup: This video covers GLM-5.2, an open-weight coding model accessible for free through OpenCode's Big Pickle interface, with roughly 200 free requests per five-hour window. It matters because the model pairs no-cost access with high token speeds and low latency for practical development work. The concrete takeaways: GLM-5.2 handles coding tasks including repo exploration, bug fixes, and refactoring, and the open weights allow local inference.
